_comment: A vendorable state-machine spec. Load it with `adaptogen plan --spec "$(cat examples/fsm.spec.json)"` or DState.prototype.plan(spec) in code. Every endpoint id must be declared in nodes or already exist. guard strings use the guard DSL (see `adaptogen describe` -> guardDSL). enforcement is off|soft|hard. This whole file is the config: copy it, change the nodes/transitions/zones, and ship your own machine.
